HGSS.106.0000:
Welcome to the Battle Hall!\f
I am your guide to the Single and
Double Battle challenges.\f
Please be aware that these challenges
are designed for a single Trainer.\f
HGSS.106.0001:
Which challenge would you
like to take?[0200,0000]
HGSS.106.0002:
At the Battle Hall, you may take Single
or Double Battle challenges alone.\f
For the Single Battle challenge, you
enter one Pokémon of at least Lv. 30.\f
The Double Battle Challenge requires
you to enter two of the same kind of\r
Pokémon that are at least Lv. 30 each.\f
Winning-streak records are kept for
individual kinds of Pokémon.\f
That makes it possible for any kind of
Pokémon to aim for no. 1.\f
When you enter the Hall, you will be
asked to choose the type and rank of\r
the Pokémon you want to battle.\f
If you manage to win ten matches in
a row, you will earn Battle Points (BP).\f
If you want to interrupt your
challenge, please save the game.\f
If you don’t save, you will be
disqualified from your challenge.\f
Please be aware of that!\f
HGSS.106.0003:
Welcome to the Battle Hall!\f
I am your guide to the Multi Battle
challenge.\f
Please be aware that this challenge
requires two Trainers.\f
HGSS.106.0004:
Would you like to take the Battle
Hall Multi Battle challenge? [0200,0000]
HGSS.106.0005:
You may team up with a friend for a
Multi Battle challenge using the\r
same kind of Pokémon that are at\r
least Lv. 30 each.\f
When you enter the Hall, you will be
asked to choose the type and rank of\r
the Pokémon you want to battle.\f
If you manage to win ten matches in
a row, you will earn Battle Points (BP).\f
Please note: a Battle Hall Multi Battle
challenge can’t be interrupted.\f
HGSS.106.0006: We hope to see you again!
HGSS.106.0007:
Which challenge level would you like to
play? Level 50 or Open Level?
HGSS.106.0008:
You must save the game before
I show you in. Is that OK?[0200,0000]
HGSS.106.0010: We look forward to your next visit.\f
HGSS.106.0011:
We’ve missed you!\f
You must save the game before you
resume your challenge. Please wait.
HGSS.106.0012:
Excuse me!\f
You didn’t save before you quit your
challenge last time.\f
Because of that, you have been
disqualified from your challenge!\f
HGSS.106.0013:
Congratulations!\f
In honor of your victory, we present
you with this commemorative print!\f
HGSS.106.0014:
The Gold Print was added to
[0103,0000,0000]’s Vs. Recorder!\f
HGSS.106.0015:
The Silver Print was added to
[0103,0000,0000]’s Vs. Recorder!\f
HGSS.106.0024:
Want to raise strong Pokémon
but have no clue which one to pick...?\f
For those Trainers who feel this way,
the Battle Factory is truly a place\r
worth visiting!
HGSS.106.0025:
You are quite right.\f
They say life is an endless series of
learning opportunities.\f
This place is the best for learning
about Pokémon battles and about\r
other Trainers...
HGSS.106.0026:
Aaaaand--bam!
Aaaaaaaaaand--bam!\f
I don’t have Pokémon yet, so I’m
practicing throwing Poké Balls!
HGSS.106.0027:
Grandma, yoo-hoo! Grandma!
I’ve come to trade Accessories!\r
I’ve got somethin’ just for my grandma!
HGSS.106.0028:
Oh, thank you, my dear...\f
You’re so cute and strong and nice...
I’m lucky to have a grandchild like you.
HGSS.106.0029:
That little girl over there with
her grandma...\f
I happen to know that little girl is
incredibly strong...\f
Looks can sometimes be deceiving.
HGSS.106.0030:
One Trainer should select
“BECOME LEADER.”\f
The other Trainer must select
“JOIN GROUP.”[0200,0000]
HGSS.106.0031:
We need to launch DS Wireless
Communications.[0200,0000]
HGSS.106.0032:
You must save the game before I
show you in. Please wait.
HGSS.106.0033:
Please choose the Pokémon you wish
to enter.\f
HGSS.106.0034:
There is an ongoing winning streak
saved for [0100,0000,0000].\f
Delete this record and start a new
challenge with [0100,0001,0000]?[0200,0000]
HGSS.106.0035:
Excuse me!\f
You don’t have a single eligible Pokémon
of at least Lv. 30!\f
HGSS.106.0036:
Excuse me!\f
For Double Battles, you must have two
of the same kind of Pokémon that are\r
at least Lv. 30 each.\f
HGSS.106.0037: Also, Eggs are ineligible to enter.\f
HGSS.106.0038:
Eggs and [0100,0001,0000] are not allowed
to enter.\f
HGSS.106.0039:
Eggs, [0100,0001,0000], and [0100,0002,0000]
are not allowed to enter.\f
HGSS.106.0056: Please come see me when you are ready.\f
HGSS.106.0057:
The Battle Hall Multi Battle challenge
requires both partners to enter the\r
same kind of Pokémon.\f
Please confer with your friend and
choose the same kind of Pokémon.\f
HGSS.106.0059:
Do you eat your favorite dish first or
leave it for later?\f
At the Battle Hall, it’s better to start
with the types that your Pokémon\r
do not like. Why?\f
Because the opposition goes up in
level as you progress!
HGSS.106.0060:
That opulent stage!\f
Your streaks of winnings are kept per
each kind of Pokémon.\r
Every Pokémon can get up there.\f
Don’t you think it’s wonderful
you can aim for the top with\r
any Pokémon?
HGSS.106.0061:
Slow...\f
My SLOWBRO is a cutie, but he’s even
battled the Brain here.\f
The Brain will take your Pokémon on at
the same level, to be fair.
HGSS.106.0063:
Here is a tip!\f
You should try the Battle Hall with
not just your favorite Pokémon,\f
but different kinds of Pokémon
if you want to build your\r
overall record as well.
HGSS.106.0064:
At the Battle Hall, if it’s the same kind
of Pokémon, you can enter different\r
ones and still keep your record.\f
You may want to have different ones
knowing different types of moves.
HGSS.106.0065:
You know how HOPPIP has two types--
Grass and Flying?\f
That means it can appear as a
Grass type and as a Flying type.\f
Me?\f
You could think of me as...
a “Lighthearted” type and\r
a “Beautiful” type, I guess.
HGSS.106.0066:
A piece of advice...\f
At the Battle Hall, the opposing
Pokémon are matched in level to yours.\f
That way, you can choose any of your
Pokémon without worrying about\r
their levels.
HGSS.106.0067:
The Battle Hall lets you keep the
winning-streak records.\r
That’s neat, huh?\f
...Wait a sec!\f
My friend and I can start challenges
with identical conditions and see who\r
can stretch their win streak\r
the longest.\r
That’s even more fun!
HGSS.106.0068:
I keep track of the total number of
wins from your longest Single Battle\r
win streaks at the Battle Hall.\f
To explain, I add only the longest win
streaks of each kind of Pokémon.
HGSS.106.0069:
When your total win-streak record hits
certain figures, you will earn BP as\r
a reward.\f
[0103,0000,0000], your total win-streak
record is presently [0137,0001,0000].\f
HGSS.106.0070:
Your total win-streak record has
reached [0137,0002,0000].\r
Here is your BP reward.\f
HGSS.106.0071:
When your total win-streak record
reaches [0137,0003,0000], you will earn BP.
HGSS.106.0073:
[0103,0000,0000], your total win-streak
record stands at [0137,0001,0000].\f
HGSS.106.0074:
[0103,0000,0000], your total win-streak
record stands at [0137,0001,0000].\f
...My goodness!
That’s a fantastic record!
HGSS.106.0075:
Winston: The Battle Hall’s been kind of
boring lately.\f
There haven’t been any dazzling
challengers who can electrify crowds.\f
The kind of challenger who can beat the
Brain... Aren’t there any around?
HGSS.106.0076:
Winston: Let me take a wild guess.
Are you getting into the Battle Hall?\r
It’s addictively fun, huh?\f
The more you win, the more kinds of
Pokémon you get to see, too.
HGSS.106.0077:
Winston: ...
...Oh, sorry for staring!\f
I saw you on stage the last time.
You’ve got some star quality.\f
I think I’m going to keep an eye on you.
There’s real charisma there.
HGSS.106.0078:
Winston: I check you out every time
you get up on stage.\f
You’re fun to watch, let me tell you.\f
Now I’m always looking forward to
seeing the combo of you and your\r
Pokémon on stage.
HGSS.106.0079:
Winston: Hey, there!
What are you going to do this time?\f
Which Pokémon are you going for a
record with next?\f
When I get to thinking about that,
I get too wound up to sleep at night.\f
That’s why I’ve been sleeping in lately!
HGSS.106.0080:
Winston: Awesome!
Seriously awesome!\r
You’re beyond awesome, even!\f
The love you show so many Pokémon...
It’s no easy feat, I can tell ya!
HGSS.106.0081:
Winston: I’ve never seen Pokémon
battle as enjoyably as yours do.\f
You’re the first of a kind for me as
Trainers go.\f
You know, I brag about you to everyone
who’s willing to listen.\f
I was saying that you’re going to be a
star before you even got a record!
HGSS.106.0082:
Winston: Go, [0103,0000,0000], go!
Go, [0103,0000,0000], go!\f
I’m thinking up some dance steps and
cheers I can do to support you.\f
If you want to see them, you’ll need to
keep working on your records!
HGSS.106.0083:
Winston: You’re phenomenal.
All the battles you waged on stage...\r
All those moments of glory...\f
Your star burns so bright and huge!
I can barely open my eyes around you!
HGSS.106.0084:
Winston: The love for Pokémon you
exhibited at the Battle Hall is as\r
infinitely deep as it is wide...\f
You can count on me, Winston, to be
your lifelong fan.\f
Just as you love Pokémon, I love you
as the Pokémon superstar!
HGSS.106.0085:
Serena: It’s about the Battle Hall...
It hasn’t excited me lately.\f
There’s been no gorgeous sort of
challenger who can dazzle me.\f
The kind of challenger who can make me
a fan... Aren’t there any around?
HGSS.106.0086:
Serena: Um... Excuse me?\f
If you don’t mind me asking, are you
getting into the Battle Hall?\f
It’s fun in an engrossing way, isn’t it?
Did you know?\f
The more you win, the more kinds of
Pokémon appear.
HGSS.106.0087:
Serena: Um... Excuse me?\f
I watched you when you were on stage.
It made me feel all tingly seeing you.\f
Um... You won’t mind if I cheer for you
from now on, will you? Please, may I?
HGSS.106.0088:
Serena: Um... Excuse me?\f
I cheer for you the best I can.\f
I can’t get up on stage with you, but
I want to lend my support to your\r
Pokémon and you for trying so hard.
HGSS.106.0089:
Serena: Um... Excuse me?\f
Can you tell me what kind of Pokémon
you’re going for a record with next?\f
When I start thinking about that, I get
sort of all choked up.\f
I have trouble sleeping at night when
I get that way.
HGSS.106.0090:
Serena: Um... Excuse me?\f
Fantastic! It’s fantastic!
You’re fabulously fantastic!\f
The love you show so many Pokémon...
It must take extraordinary effort.
HGSS.106.0091:
Serena: I’ve never seen Pokémon
battle as enjoyably as yours do.\f
You’re the first Trainer ever who’s
done that.\f
I... I brag about you to all my friends.
I hope you don’t mind.\f
I tell them I wish I could be as
wonderful a Trainer as you!
HGSS.106.0092:
Serena: Hurray, hurray, [0103,0000,0000]!
Go, Pokémon, go!\f
...Oh! Um... Excuse me.\f
I was working on cheers and a dance
routine for you.\f
B-but, I’m sorry for being so silly and
giddy and...
HGSS.106.0093:
Serena: You’re so inspiring to me.\f
All the glory you earned while battling
so often on that shining stage...\f
Just seeing you makes me feel all
happy inside. ♫
HGSS.106.0094:
Serena: Your Pokémon love that you’ve
shown at the Battle Hall is as infinitely\r
deep as it is wide...\f
It’s amazing, but you love every kind of
Pokémon there is.\f
I love you for being so amazing and
dedicated!
HGSS.106.0095:
Lyra: Hi, [0103,0000,0000].
I love watching you battle here.\f
Cause...
you have fun whether you win\r
or lose!
HGSS.106.0096:
Ethan: The Battle Hall is great for
Pokémon fans like me!\f
I get to see so many new kinds of
Pokémon I’ve never seen.\f
It’s so cool!
HGSS.106.0097:
Mom: [0103,0000,0000]!\f
I couldn’t help checking up on you!\f
Everyone is working hard, but I have
to say you look more delighted than\r
anyone else!\f
Oh, [0103,0000,0000], that’s right!\f
I should go to the Department Store
in Goldenrod and buy some useful\r
items for you on the way home!
HGSS.106.0098:
Professor Oak: You keep amazing me
over and over again.\f
What a Trainer you turned out to be!\f
It’s not enough that you caught
Pokémon in numbers beyond belief.\f
That alone is fantastic enough.
But you’ve bonded and battled with\r
them as well.\f
I am so proud to know you!
HGSS.106.0099:
Whitney: I love showy events like
the Battle Hall.\f
I’m not saying that I want to stand out
in the crowd...\f
I just love seeing cute Pokémon
getting lots of attention!
